---
title: "RealDataNoBoot"
author: "Shi Bo"
date: "2025-01-25"
output: pdf_document
---

### Packages ###
```{r}
# detach("package:ranger", unload=TRUE)
# install.packages("Matrix")
library(data.table)
library(glmnet)
library(balanceHD)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(balanceHD)
library(boot)
library(pogs)
source("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/utilis.R")
```

### Read Files ###
```{r}
A_Smoking <- readRDS("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/CleanedDataLungCancer/A_Smoking.rds") 
X_PhenotypeSurvival <- data.matrix(readRDS("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/CleanedDataLungCancer/X_fourthorder_MICE.rds"))
Y_SurvivalTime <- readRDS("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/CleanedDataLungCancer/Y_SurvivalTime.rds")
M_raw_cleaned <- readRDS("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/CleanedDataLungCancer/M_raw_cleaned.rds")
criteria = apply(M_raw_cleaned, 2, sd) > 0.1
M_sd0.1 <- M_raw_cleaned[, criteria]
gene_sites_M_raw_cleaned <- readRDS("/usr3/graduate/shibo/UHDmediation/CleanedDataLungCancer/gene_sites_for_M_raw_cleaned.rds")
gene_sites_M_sd0.1 <- gene_sites_M_raw_cleaned[criteria]

nn = length(A_Smoking)
cat("Number of missing values M:", sum(is.na(M_raw_cleaned)),"\n")
cat("Number of missing values X:", sum(is.na(M_raw_cleaned)),"\n")
cat("Dim X:", dim(X_PhenotypeSurvival),"\n")
cat("Dim M:", dim(M_sd0.1),"\n")
```

```{r}
########################### Parameters ###########################
# Register parallel backend
# num_cores <- detectCores() - 1  # Use available cores minus 1 to avoid freezing the system
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1
cl <- makeCluster(n_cores)
registerDoParallel(cores = cl)

optimizer = "pogs.new"
K1 = 2.75
K2 = 2.75
zeta = 0.5
b = 300
num_folds = 3
res = matrix(0, ncol = 3, nrow = b)
lam = "lambda.min"
```


### parallel computing version


```{r}
# ===========================
# Parallel bootstrap loop
# ===========================

res_list <- foreach(i = 1:b,
                    .combine = rbind,
                    .packages = c("glmnet", "balanceHD"),
                    .export = c("X_PhenotypeSurvival",
                                "M_sd0.1",
                                "A_Smoking",
                                "Y_SurvivalTime",
                                "num_folds",
                                "lam",
                                "zeta",
                                "K1",
                                "K2",
                                "optimizer",
                                "nn")) %dopar% {

  start_time <- Sys.time() 
  
  sample_indices <- sample(1:nn, size = nn, replace = TRUE)
  X <- X_PhenotypeSurvival[sample_indices,]
  M <- M_sd0.1[sample_indices,]
  
  A <- A_Smoking[sample_indices]
  Y <- log(Y_SurvivalTime[sample_indices])
  
  treat_index   <- which(A == 1)
  control_index <- which(A == 0) 
  
  Xt <- data.matrix(X[treat_index, ])
  Xc <- data.matrix(X[control_index, ])
  M1 <- M[treat_index, ]
  M0 <- M[control_index, ]
  Yt <- Y[treat_index]
  Yc <- Y[control_index]
  
    ########################### Cross-Fitting Version ###########################
  X_bar <- colMeans(data.matrix(X))
  
  p <- dim(X)[2]
  q <- dim(M)[2]
  n_boot <- nrow(X)
  
  # Use stratified two-fold split by treatment status
  # This keeps both treated and control observations in each fold.
  treat_perm <- sample(treat_index, length(treat_index), replace = FALSE)
  control_perm <- sample(control_index, length(control_index), replace = FALSE)
  
  D1 <- c(
    treat_perm[seq_len(floor(length(treat_perm) / 2))],
    control_perm[seq_len(floor(length(control_perm) / 2))]
  )
  D2 <- setdiff(seq_len(n_boot), D1)
  
  cv_nfolds <- function(n_obs) {
    if (n_obs < 3) {
      stop("Too few observations in one cross-fitting fold for cv.glmnet.")
    }
    min(num_folds, n_obs)
  }
  
  fit_gamma_lasso <- function(X_sub, M_sub, Y_sub) {
    X_sub <- data.matrix(X_sub)
    M_sub <- data.matrix(M_sub)
    Y_sub <- as.vector(Y_sub)
    
    W_sub <- data.matrix(cbind(X_sub, M_sub))
    
    fit_cv <- cv.glmnet(
      W_sub,
      Y_sub,
      nfolds = cv_nfolds(length(Y_sub)),
      intercept = FALSE,
      alpha = 1
    )
    
    phi_hat <- as.vector(coef(fit_cv, s = lam))[-1]
    gamma_hat <- phi_hat[(p + 1):(p + q)]
    
    return(gamma_hat)
  }
  
  fit_B_lasso <- function(X_sub, M_sub) {
    X_sub <- data.matrix(X_sub)
    M_sub <- data.matrix(M_sub)
    
    B_hat <- matrix(0, nrow = ncol(M_sub), ncol = ncol(X_sub))
    
    for (jj in 1:ncol(M_sub)) {
      Mi <- M_sub[, jj]
      
      cv_model <- cv.glmnet(
        X_sub,
        Mi,
        alpha = 1,
        intercept = FALSE,
        nfolds = cv_nfolds(nrow(X_sub))
      )
      
      B_hat[jj, ] <- as.vector(coef(cv_model, s = lam))[-1]
    }
    
    return(B_hat)
  }
  
  rb_mean <- function(design_mat, response_vec, target_vec, K_value) {
    output <- residualBalance.mean(
      data.matrix(design_mat),
      as.vector(response_vec),
      balance.target = as.vector(target_vec),
      zeta = zeta,
      fit.method = "elnet",
      alpha = 1,
      K = K_value,
      optimizer = optimizer
    )
    
    return(as.numeric(output[1]))
  }
  
  estimate_one_direction <- function(fold_B, fold_eval) {
    
    ############################
    # Fold-specific indices
    ############################
    fold_B_treat <- intersect(fold_B, treat_index)
    fold_B_control <- intersect(fold_B, control_index)
    
    fold_eval_treat <- intersect(fold_eval, treat_index)
    fold_eval_control <- intersect(fold_eval, control_index)
    
    ############################
    # Data used to estimate B0 and B1
    ############################
    Xt_B <- data.matrix(X[fold_B_treat, , drop = FALSE])
    Xc_B <- data.matrix(X[fold_B_control, , drop = FALSE])
    
    M1_B <- data.matrix(M[fold_B_treat, , drop = FALSE])
    M0_B <- data.matrix(M[fold_B_control, , drop = FALSE])
    
    ############################
    # Data used to estimate gamma and residual balancing
    ############################
    Xt_eval <- data.matrix(X[fold_eval_treat, , drop = FALSE])
    Xc_eval <- data.matrix(X[fold_eval_control, , drop = FALSE])
    
    M1_eval <- data.matrix(M[fold_eval_treat, , drop = FALSE])
    M0_eval <- data.matrix(M[fold_eval_control, , drop = FALSE])
    
    Yt_eval <- Y[fold_eval_treat]
    Yc_eval <- Y[fold_eval_control]
    
    Wt_eval <- data.matrix(cbind(Xt_eval, M1_eval))
    Wc_eval <- data.matrix(cbind(Xc_eval, M0_eval))
    
    ############################
    # Nuisance estimation
    ############################
    B0_hat <- fit_B_lasso(Xc_B, M0_B)
    B1_hat <- fit_B_lasso(Xt_B, M1_B)
    
    gamma_1_hat <- fit_gamma_lasso(Xt_eval, M1_eval, Yt_eval)
    gamma_0_hat <- fit_gamma_lasso(Xc_eval, M0_eval, Yc_eval)
    
    B0_Xbar <- B0_hat %*% X_bar
    B1_Xbar <- B1_hat %*% X_bar
    
    ############################
    # Y10: treated outcome model + control mediator model
    ############################
    contrast_Y10_1 <- c(X_bar, B0_Xbar)
    
    outputY10_1 <- rb_mean(
      Wt_eval,
      Yt_eval,
      contrast_Y10_1,
      K1
    )
    
    M0_gamma_1 <- M0_eval %*% gamma_1_hat
    
    outputY10_2 <- rb_mean(
      Xc_eval,
      M0_gamma_1,
      X_bar,
      K2
    )
    
    Y10_db <- outputY10_1 + outputY10_2 -
      as.numeric(t(B0_Xbar) %*% gamma_1_hat)
    
    ############################
    # Y11: treated outcome model + treated mediator model
    ############################
    contrast_Y11_1 <- c(X_bar, B1_Xbar)
    
    outputY11_1 <- rb_mean(
      Wt_eval,
      Yt_eval,
      contrast_Y11_1,
      K1
    )
    
    M1_gamma_1 <- M1_eval %*% gamma_1_hat
    
    outputY11_2 <- rb_mean(
      Xt_eval,
      M1_gamma_1,
      X_bar,
      K2
    )
    
    Y11_db <- outputY11_1 + outputY11_2 -
      as.numeric(t(B1_Xbar) %*% gamma_1_hat)
    
    ############################
    # Y00: control outcome model + control mediator model
    ############################
    contrast_Y00_1 <- c(X_bar, B0_Xbar)
    
    outputY00_1 <- rb_mean(
      Wc_eval,
      Yc_eval,
      contrast_Y00_1,
      K1
    )
    
    M0_gamma_0 <- M0_eval %*% gamma_0_hat
    
    outputY00_2 <- rb_mean(
      Xc_eval,
      M0_gamma_0,
      X_bar,
      K2
    )
    
    Y00_db <- outputY00_1 + outputY00_2 -
      as.numeric(t(B0_Xbar) %*% gamma_0_hat)
    
    return(c(
      Y10_db = Y10_db,
      Y11_db = Y11_db,
      Y00_db = Y00_db
    ))
  }
  
  ###########################
  # Two directions of CF
  ###########################
  est_1 <- estimate_one_direction(fold_B = D1, fold_eval = D2)
  est_2 <- estimate_one_direction(fold_B = D2, fold_eval = D1)
  
  ###########################
  # Final cross-fitted estimates
  ###########################
  Y10_db <- 0.5 * (est_1["Y10_db"] + est_2["Y10_db"])
  Y11_db <- 0.5 * (est_1["Y11_db"] + est_2["Y11_db"])
  Y00_db <- 0.5 * (est_1["Y00_db"] + est_2["Y00_db"])
  
  ########################### Results ###########################
  NIE_debiasing <- Y11_db - Y10_db
  NDE_debiasing <- Y10_db - Y00_db
  TE_de <- NIE_debiasing + NDE_debiasing
  
  end_time <- Sys.time()   
  elapsed_time <- as.numeric(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "secs"))
  
  cat("Loop:", i,
      "| NIE:", NIE_debiasing,
      "| NDE:", NDE_debiasing,
      "| TE:", TE_de,
      "| Time:", round(elapsed_time, 2), "sec\n")
  
  c(NIE_debiasing, NDE_debiasing, TE_de, elapsed_time)
}

# ===========================
# Convert result
# ===========================
res <- res_list[, 1:3]
time_per_loop <- res_list[, 4]
```


```{r}
# Define Bootstrap Function
boot_fn <- function(data, indices) {
  sample_data <- data[indices]  # Resample data
  stat <- mean(sample_data)  # Compute statistic (mean)
  se <- sd(sample_data) / sqrt(length(sample_data))  # Compute standard error
  return(c(stat, se))  # Return both statistic & SE
}

# Compute Bootstrap CIs for Each Column in boot.results
results_list <- list()
# col_names <- c("Y11_db", "Y10_db", "Y00_db", "NIE_debiasing", "NDE_debiasing", "TE_de")
col_names <- c("NIE_debiasing", "NDE_debiasing", "TE_de")

for (i in 1:3) {
  # Create boot object
  boot_obj <- boot(data = boot_results[,i, drop = T], statistic = boot_fn, R = n.boot)
  
  # Compute CIs
  bca_CI <- round(boot.ci(boot_obj, type = "bca")$bca[4:5], 5)  # Extract BCa CI
  t_CI <- round(boot.ci(boot_obj, type = "stud")$stud[4:5], 5)  # Extract Bootstrap-t CI
  quantile_CI <- round(quantile(boot_results[,i, drop = T], probs = c(0.025, 0.975)), 5)  # Quantile CI

  # Store results
  results_list[[i]] <- c(col_names[i], round(mean(boot_results[,i, drop = T]), 5), 
                         paste0("(", bca_CI[1], ", ", bca_CI[2], ")"),
                         paste0("(", t_CI[1], ", ", t_CI[2], ")"),
                         paste0("(", quantile_CI[1], ", ", quantile_CI[2], ")"))
}

# Convert list to dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, results_list))
colnames(results_df) <- c("Estimator", "Mean", "BCa CI", "Bootstrap-t CI", "Quantile CI")

# Print results as a formatted table
print(results_df)
```


```{r}
t.test(bootresultsHighD$NIE)
t.test(bootresultsHighD$NDE)
t.test(bootresultsHighD$TE)
```



```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)

# Histogram
hist_plot <- ggplot(data.frame(boot_results[,2, drop = T]), aes(x = boot_results[,3, drop = T])) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "blue", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Bootstrap Estimates", x = expression(hat(theta)), y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

# QQ-Plot
qq_plot <- ggplot(data.frame(boot_results[,3, drop = T]), aes(sample = boot_results[,3, drop = T])) +
  stat_qq() +
  stat_qq_line() +
  labs(title = "QQ-Plot of Bootstrap Estimates", x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
  theme_minimal()

# Display plots
library(gridExtra)
grid.arrange(hist_plot, qq_plot, ncol = 2)

```
